response.justification: The candidate is a near-ideal match: nearly two decades of fullstack experience with recent, sustained TypeScript/Node.js/React product work (Optilyz, RIDE, re:cinq), current hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling experience that directly satisfies the rarest requirement, plus Docker/Kubernetes, AWS, MongoDB/MySQL, and an exceptionally deep testing culture (TDD practitioner, author of test frameworks, testing instructor). A CS degree from ETH Zürich and Berlin location round it out. The only gaps are unverified Nest.js exposure and no stated Kotlin or Python, which are secondary and easily probed in an interview.
strengths: Deep, recent fullstack TypeScript/Node.js/React experience well beyond the 6-year bar
Current AI-agent development and MCP tooling work, directly matching the AI agent requirement
Exceptional testing and craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed despite it being in the primary stack
Kotlin and Python are absent from the skill set, and Java experience appears dated
Authentication/authorization and security best practices are not evidenced on the resume

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP infrastructure experience
